creator: avilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
shared-mime-info currently registers in plist all auto-generated files (those in share/mime/*/ directories), while only files in share/mime/packages/ should be registered, and then update-mime-database should generate the others. The same applies to many more ports, but that's not the point here. Anyway, registering those files can create conflicts when another package updates the definition of one of such auto-generated files.

Fix: The attached patch, apart from doing some spring cleanup, removes auto-generated files and directories from plist, just forcing their deletion on package deinstallation. It also avoids running update-mime-database in install target, and does that in post-install instead (unifying port and package installation).

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: make install -C misc/shared-mime-info
make install -C x11/kdelibs4 KDE4_PREFIX=/usr/local
